steps.title: Use the photo context
steps.content: The photograph featured a portrait, so the word describes what the image visually contained or showed. The surrounding context is about Nina looking at a framed photograph.

steps.title: Eliminate impossible actions
steps.content: A would mean the photo paid no attention to the portrait. B would mean it approved the portrait, and C would mean it questioned the portrait; photographs do not perform those actions here. The answer is D.
